title: WordPress 7.0 Beta 5
content:
WordPress 7.0 Beta 5 is here!

Test the latest version of WordPress on a test server and site.

  • Latest Beta Version: WordPress 7.0 Beta 5 is ready for download and testing!
  • Development Status: This version of the WordPress software is still under development.
  • Testing Warning: Please do not install, run, or test this version of WordPress on production or mission-critical websites.
